creator: vnovy@vnovy.net
text:
Board has PATA and SATA controlers.

PATA controller (Marvel vendor=0x11ab, dev=0x6101, revid=0xb1) is probed as
ATA GENERIC and no disk or cdrom is found 

SATA controllers (intel vendor=0x8086, dev=0x2825, revid=0x02) are also
probed as ATA GENERIC and disk is probed as UDMA33 device.

verbose dmesg follows
